token.description: Personal API token of your Apify account. In Apify Console, you can find your API token in the Settings section under the Integrations tab after you login. See the Apify Docs for more information.

base_url.description: Placeholder base URL used only to construct the engine runtime before the Tier-2 hook delegates to the legacy connector.

mode.description: Set to fixture for credential-free legacy fixture tests.
